title: Power Apps Canvas Control Bible schema v0.1

confidence_levels.High: Directly captured from current Microsoft control page or shared property page.
confidence_levels.Medium: Reasonable from Microsoft docs and control family, but exact per-control page/code-view verification needed.
confidence_levels.Gap flagged: Known control exists but property extraction is incomplete.
confidence_levels.Community/tooling gap: Reported by community/tooling issue or runtime behaviour, not standard public docs.
